AM.T: He makes my feet like those of a deer and stations me upon the heights.

PM.T: Then Jesus told His disciples, “If anyone wants to come after Me, he must deny himself and take up his cross and follow Me.

AM.T: The LORD is good to those who wait for Him, to the soul who seeks Him.

PM.T: Grace to all who love our Lord Jesus Christ with an undying love.

AM.T: I lift up my eyes to the hills. From where does my help come? My help comes from the LORD, the Maker of heaven and earth.

PM.T: And our people must also learn to devote themselves to good works in order to meet the pressing needs of others, so that they will not be unfruitful.

AM.T: Make a level path for your feet, and all your ways will be sure.

PM.T: My brothers, as you hold out your faith in our glorious Lord Jesus Christ, do not show favoritism.

AM.T: He who listens to life-giving reproof will dwell among the wise.

PM.T: Preach the word; be prepared in season and out of season; reprove, rebuke, and encourage with every form of patient instruction.

AM.T: Blessed are those who keep His testimonies and seek Him with all their heart.

PM.T: But as for you, brothers, do not grow weary in well-doing.

AM.T: the commandments of the LORD are radiant, giving light to the eyes.

PM.T: Make sure that no one repays evil for evil. Always pursue what is good for one another and for all people.

AM.T: The fear of the LORD is the instruction of wisdom, and humility comes before honor.

PM.T: Therefore I urge you, brothers, on account of God’s mercy, to offer your bodies as living sacrifices, holy and pleasing to God, which is your spiritual service of worship.

AM.T: I will proclaim the decree spoken to Me by the LORD: “You are My Son; today I have become Your Father.

PM.T: Now faith is the assurance of what we hope for and the certainty of what we do not see.

AM.T: Though He slay me, I will hope in Him.

PM.T: And we have this commandment from Him: Whoever loves God must love his brother as well.

AM.T: As iron sharpens iron, so one man sharpens another.

PM.T: Love takes no pleasure in evil, but rejoices in the truth.

AM.T: He who acquires wisdom loves himself; one who safeguards understanding will find success.

PM.T: And this is the message we have heard from Him and announce to you: God is light, and in Him there is no darkness at all.

AM.T: I will sing to the LORD all my life; I will sing praise to my God while I have my being.

PM.T: For we walk by faith, not by sight.

AM.T: Let the wicked man forsake his way and the unrighteous man his thoughts; let him return to the LORD, that He may have compassion, and to our God, for He will freely pardon.

PM.T: What then shall we say in response to these things? If God is for us, who can be against us?

AM.T: But let all who take refuge in You rejoice; let them ever shout for joy. May You shelter them, that those who love Your name may rejoice in You.

PM.T: And He said to them, “Watch out! Guard yourselves against every form of greed, for one’s life does not consist in the abundance of his possessions.”

AM.T: A man of many companions may come to ruin, but there is a friend who stays closer than a brother.

PM.T: Therefore if anyone is in Christ, he is a new creation. The old has passed away. Behold, the new has come!

AM.T: Your word, O LORD, is everlasting; it is firmly fixed in the heavens.

PM.T: And He said to them, “Go into all the world and preach the gospel to every creature.

AM.T: Your word is a lamp to my feet and a light to my path.

PM.T: “Blessed is the coming kingdom of our father David!” “Hosanna in the highest!”

AM.T: Not to us, O LORD, not to us, but to Your name be the glory, because of Your loving devotion, because of Your faithfulness.

PM.T: Pursue peace with everyone, as well as holiness, without which no one will see the Lord.

AM.T: To the roots of the mountains I descended; the earth beneath me barred me in forever! But You raised my life from the pit, O LORD my God!

PM.T: Brothers, if someone is caught in a trespass, you who are spiritual should restore him with a spirit of gentleness. But watch yourself, or you also may be tempted.

AM.T: The precepts of the LORD are right, bringing joy to the heart;

PM.T: Christ redeemed us from the curse of the law by becoming a curse for us. For it is written: “Cursed is everyone who is hung on a tree.”

AM.T: Search me, O God, and know my heart; test me and know my concerns.

PM.T: Not only that, but we also rejoice in our sufferings, because we know that suffering produces perseverance; perseverance, character; and character, hope.

AM.T: When all has been heard, the conclusion of the matter is this: Fear God and keep His commandments, because this is the whole duty of man.

PM.T: When Christ, who is your life, appears, then you also will appear with Him in glory.

AM.T: Taste and see that the LORD is good; blessed is the man who takes refuge in Him!

PM.T: Be kind and tenderhearted to one another, forgiving each other just as in Christ God forgave you.

AM.T: Surely goodness and mercy will follow me all the days of my life, and I will dwell in the house of the LORD forever.

PM.T: And over all these virtues put on love, which is the bond of perfect unity.

AM.T: When I behold Your heavens, the work of Your fingers, the moon and the stars, which You have set in place — what is man that You are mindful of him, or the son of man that You care for him?

PM.T: “Glory to God in the highest, and on earth peace to men on whom His favor rests!”

AM.T: To everything there is a season, and a time for every purpose under heaven:

PM.T: Now it is clear that no one is justified before God by the law, because, “The righteous will live by faith.”

AM.T: The LORD your God is among you; He is mighty to save. He will rejoice over you with gladness; He will quiet you with His love; He will rejoice over you with singing.”

PM.T: Humble yourselves before the Lord, and He will exalt you.

AM.T: Do not answer a fool according to his folly, or you yourself will be like him. Answer a fool according to his folly, lest he become wise in his own eyes.

PM.T: He must gently reprove those who oppose him, in the hope that God may grant them repentance leading to a knowledge of the truth.

AM.T: Trust in the LORD with all your heart, and lean not on your own understanding;

PM.T: that if you confess with your mouth, “Jesus is Lord,” and believe in your heart that God raised Him from the dead, you will be saved.

AM.T: I waited patiently for the LORD; He inclined to me and heard my cry.

PM.T: I tell you, everyone who confesses Me before men, the Son of Man will also confess him before the angels of God.
